name: Beverly JCG Ltd.
summary: Beverly JCG Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in trading and distribution, and medical businesses. Its Trading and Distribution segment engages in the trading and distribution of steel raw materials, consumables, instruments, and semi-finished products for steel mills, iron and steel foundries, and aluminum smelters in the Asia-Pacific region, as well as provision of ancillary services. The company's Aesthetic Medical segment provides aesthetic medical services, including the provision of aesthetic medical, beauty, and wellness services in Asia. Its Event Organisation and Management Consultancy segment engages in the provision of event organisation and management consultancy services. The company's Investment and Others segment provides management services, as well as marketing, distribution, and related services. The company was formerly known as JCG Investment Holdings Ltd. and changed its name to Beverly JCG Ltd. in July 2020. Beverly JCG Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is based in Singapore.
